text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I decide to go shopping
together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry, I was just humming along with the
radio. I really love this song!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You know those poppy, upbeat songs that all the
kids are into? I just adore that stuff! ♪

text_block_list.name: Radio DJ
text_block_list.text:
Whew, that one really takes me back! Let's
continue our trip down memory lane with more
golden oldies!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
N-no way! That was... a classic? But I was really
grooving with it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky's mood drops like a rock.
